name: Black Hawk Acquisition Corp
business: Black Hawk Acquisition Corp is a blank check company formed for the purpose of entering into a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, recapitalization, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. As of the filing date, it has entered into a Business Combination Agreement with Vesicor Therapeutics, Inc. and intends to consummate a business combination. The company currently has no revenue and has had losses since inception from incurring formation and operating costs.

exposures.sentence: On April 26, 2025, we entered into a Business Combination Agreement with Vesicor Therapeutics, Inc. and BH Merger Sub, Inc., pursuant to which we intend to consummate a business combination (the Business Combination ), subject to the satisfaction of customary closing conditions.
